scope: Patched and installed BTS v4 as an OS-gated receipt/reasoning reconstruction scaffold; no full OS export.

results.name: switch_before_selection_denied
results.detail: BTS_TOOL_SWITCH ordering violation in turn STAGE6D-TEST-SWITCH-BEFORE: switch must occur after BTS_TOOL_SELECTION and before BTS_TOOL_EXECUTION (pipeline_pos=0)

results.name: gated_subprocess_forbidden_denied
results.detail: BTS OS gate denied/deferred action: DENY FORBIDDEN_VALIDATION_METHOD

changes: Installed runtime/governance/bts_v4/BTS.py as patched OS-gated BTS v4 scaffold.
Added _run_pre_action_gate wrapper to route BTS-managed subprocess and managed file-write surfaces through Stage6B pre-tool action gate.
Hardened BTS_TOOL_SWITCH ordering to only allow switch after selection and before execution.
Added BTS_V4_OS_PATH_REGISTRY_v1.json binding BTS ledger/write paths to OS layout.
Added BTS_V4_GATED_RECEIPT_ENGINE_REQUIRED_v1 invariant and active index entry.
accepted_warnings: No full OS export in this stage by design; live root is changed and support/proof bundle is produced.
BTS cannot intercept ChatGPT platform tools directly; it governs BTS-managed execution routed through this OS module.
BOOT executor still reports git_dir_missing as expected for ZIP/live-root authority without .git.
blocked_or_deferred: Future stage should wrap export/filesystem executors to require BTS turn records, then produce full authority export.

see_evidence_refs.claim: Per-action governance pattern: policy engine intercepts each agent action before execution; framework adapters; incremental packages.
OWASP Agentic Applications Top 10 is a peer-reviewed operational risk taxonomy.
OpenAI Agents SDK supports full traces of context/tools/handoffs and agentic applications.
